column1: C[csobod: Let's do a Malkovitch game! If you're not familiar with the term, it's a game where each player records their reasoning behind each move
column2: even just a one or two-word entry is fine. The tab for the Malkovitch Journal is above the chat box, next to the speech bubbles.

column1: csobod: At the end of the match, our journals are revealed and we can more effectively review!
